hooks.command: command -v "${MOVE_FLOW:-move-flow}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo '[move-flow plugin] move-flow binary not found. Install move-flow or set MOVE_FLOW env var. Please warn the user.'
input=$(cat); case "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')" in *.move) echo "$input" | ${MOVE_FLOW:-move-flow} hook edit;; esac
